title: Longest Arithmetic Subsequence of Given Difference

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,3,4], difference = 1 Output: 4 Explanation: The longest arithmetic subsequence is [1,2,3,4].
arr = [1,3,5,7], difference = 1 Output: 1 Explanation: The longest arithmetic subsequence is any single element.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The longest arithmetic subsequence is any single element.

testcases.input: arr = [1,5,7,8,5,3,4,2,1], difference = -2 Output: 4 Explanation: The longest arithmetic subsequence is [7,5,3,1].
